The cal sheet shows deviation at both zero and span points (not a simple constant offset), meaning both zero and span adjustment are needed and the as-found/as-left FD+DOC record doesn't yet demonstrate the instrument was brought within tolerance — so it's dispositioned as `fail` / `installed-defective` pending re-adjustment, re-test, and completed documentation.
